prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger** (ball-bearing, 62mm compressor wheel) for the **A20NHT (LHU) 2.0L Turbo engine**, paired with a **custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust system by Milltek Sport** (304 stainless steel, non-resonated, 76mm primary pipes) to eliminate backpressure and optimize spool at 2,800 RPM. Requires a **Motec M150 ECU** with custom calibration by **Dynojet UK** to target 450whp on 99 RON fuel with a **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 high-flow fuel pump** and **Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors** (1,050cc/min).

Install **Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV)** with **Vauxhall Insignia VXR-specific spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear)** and **polyurethane bushings by Powerflex (PFF85-501, PFF85-502)** to eliminate subframe flex. Pair with **AP Racing CP8660 front brake calipers** (6-piston, 380mm discs) and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for fade-resistant stopping power, along with a **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake line kit** for pedal firmness.

Replace the stock **Aisin TR-80SN 8-speed automatic transmission** with a **ZF 8HP75X (from BMW M550i) with a **Level 10 JB4 transmission tuning module** for faster shifts (120ms) and **Falken FK510 255/35R19 tires** on **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (19x9.5 ET35)** to handle increased torque. Add a **Pectel SQ6M standalone transmission controller** for custom shift maps and launch control (2,500 RPM dump).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Insignia VXR-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (30mm overhang)** and **rear diffuser by Maxton Design (Type 4, 3-piece)** to reduce lift by 35%. Paint in **Vauxhall Ampera Blue (B90M) with matte black accents** and **3M 2080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap on the roof**.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood (Insignia VXR-specific, 3.5kg weight reduction)** with **custom NACA ducts** to feed the **Garrett GTX3582R turbo** and **carbon fiber side skirts by Varis Japan** (pre-preg autoclave, 2x2 twill weave). Add **DRLs by LUX H8 V4 (CSP chip, 6,000K)** and **custom LED taillights by Diode Dynamics (Cobra-style, sequential turn signals)** for aggressive lighting.

**Recaro Sportster CS seats (Vauxhall Insignia VXR-specific mounts)** upholstered in **Alcantara (Miko Dinamica) with red stitching** and **custom door cards by Cobra Seats (carbon fiber inserts, red LED ambient lighting)**. Replace the stock steering wheel with a **Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede, flat-bottom)** and add a **custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, 6-point, bolt-in)** for chassis rigidity and motorsport aesthetics.
